nl_query: For each question paper, show the paper title, total marks, number of leaf questions, number of answer key rubrics defined, number of preparers, approval status, and the name of the user who approved it.
failed_sql: SELECT qp.title, qp.total_marks, COUNT(q.id) AS num_leaf_questions, COUNT(akr.id) AS num_answer_key_rubrics, COUNT(DISTINCT ak.preparer_id) AS num_preparers, ak.status AS approval_status, app_user.display_name AS approved_by_name FROM question_paper qp JOIN question q ON q.qp_id = qp.id JOIN answer_key ak ON ak.qp_id = qp.id JOIN answer_key_rubric akr ON akr.answer_key_id = ak.id JOIN app_user ON ak.approved_by = app_user.id GROUP BY qp.title, qp.total_marks, ak.status, app_user.display_name
